title.ko: 인쇄 회로; 전기 장치의 케이싱 또는 구조적 세부; 전기 부품 조립체의 제조
title.en: PRINTED CIRCUITS; CASINGS OR CONSTRUCTIONAL DETAILS OF ELECTRIC APPARATUS; MANUFACTURE OF ASSEMBLAGES OF ELECTRICAL COMPONENTS

definition.ko: 인쇄된 것이 아닌 전기소자의 유무에 관계 되지 않는 인쇄회로 형식, 제조 H05K1/00, H05K3/00 케이싱, 캐비넷 또는 서랍; 구조적 세부 H05K5/00; 7/00 차폐 H05K9/00 라디오 수신기 또는 텔레비전 수상기와 다른 장치와의 조합 H05K11/00 전자적 조합체의 제조 H05K13/00 동작의 신뢰성을 개선하기 위한 장치 H05K10/00

title.en: Printed circuits
Details
Use of materials for the substrate
Insulated metal substrate
Use of materials for the metallic pattern
Printed elements for providing electric connections to or between printed circuits

title.ko: 2개이상의 인쇄회로의 구조적 결합(인쇄회로에 대한 또는 인쇄회로간의 전기적 접속을 위한 것, H05K 1/11, H01R 12/00)
title.en: Structural association of two or more printed circuits (providing electric connection to or between printed circuits H05K0001110000, H01R0012000000)
incorporating printed electric components, e.g. printed resistors, capacitors or inductors

title.ko: 비-인쇄 전기 부품과 구조적으로 결합된 것 (H05K 1/16이 우선)
title.en: structurally associated with non-printed electric components  (H05K0001160000 takes precedence)
associated with surface mounted components
associated with components mounted in printed circuit boards [PCB], e.g. insert-mounted components [IMC]
associated with components mounted in and supported by recessed areas of the PCBs

associated with components inserted in holes through the PCBs and wherein terminals of the components are connected to printed contacts on the walls of the holes or at the edges thereof or protruding over or into the holes
associated with components encapsulated in the insulating substrate of the PCBs; associated with components  incorporated in internal layers of multilayer circuit boards
characterised by the use of flexible or folded printed circuits
Apparatus or processes for manufacturing printed circuits

in which the conductive material is applied to the surface of the insulating support and is thereafter removed from such areas of the surface which are not intended for current conducting or shielding
the conductive material being removed mechanically, e.g. by punching
the conductive material being removed chemically or electrolytically, e.g. by photo-etch process
being removed electrolytically
the conductive material being removed by electric discharge, e.g. by spark erosion
in which conductive material is applied to the insulating support in such a manner as to form the desired conductive pattern
using printing techniques to apply the conductive material
using spraying techniques to apply the conductive material
by cathodic sputtering
using precipitation techniques to apply the conductive material
by affixing prefabricated conductor pattern
Secondary treatment of printed circuits
Reinforcing of the conductive pattern
Cleaning or polishing of the conductive pattern
Applying non-metallic protective coatings
Assembling printed circuits with electric components, e.g. with resistors
with surface mounted components (H05K0003320000 takes precedence)
with lead-in-hole components (H05K0003320000 takes precedence)
electrically connecting electric components or wires to printed circuits
by conductive adhesives
by abutting or pinching;  Mechanical auxiliary parts therefor
by welding
by soldering
Surface mounted components
Lead-in-hole components
Solder masks
Solder materials or compositions specially adapted therefor
Application of solder
Application of molten solder, e.g. dip soldering
Plating of solder
Application of solder preforms; Transferring prefabricated solder patterns
Application of solder paste, slurry or powder (using printing techniques to form the desired conductive pattern of the printed circuit by applying conductive material H05K0003120000)
Composition of fluxes; Application thereof; Other processes of activating the contact surfaces
Heating processes for reflow soldering
Assembling printed circuits with other printed circuits
Improvement of the adhesion between the insulating substrate and the metal
Forming printed elements for providing electric connections to or between printed circuits

Manufacturing multi-layer circuits
